MakeAdversaryDefault.Name: Use compact sheet as the default adversary sheet
MakeAdversaryDefault.Hint: When enabled, adversary actors open with the compact sheet by default. Reload after changing this setting.

MakeCharacterDefault.Name: Use compact sheet as the default character sheet
MakeCharacterDefault.Hint: When enabled, character actors open with the compact sheet by default. Reload after changing this setting.

MakeEnvironmentDefault.Name: Use compact sheet as the default environment sheet
MakeEnvironmentDefault.Hint: When enabled, environment actors open with the compact sheet by default. Reload after changing this setting.
